bidder: Servier S.A.S (via Servier Detroit Inc., a wholly owned subsidiary of Servier Pharmaceuticals LLC)
L1_headline: + DAWN – Servier announces planned tender offer (pre-commencement). | 03/06/26
L2_brief: Servier S.A.S, through its subsidiary Servier Detroit Inc., has entered into a Merger Agreement dated March 6, 2026 to acquire all outstanding shares of Day One Biopharmaceuticals (DAWN) via a tender offer followed by a merger. The tender offer has not yet commenced; this SC TO-C filing relates solely to preliminary communications. No offer price, premium, or board recommendation details are disclosed in this pre-commencement filing.

offer_terms.offer_price: Not disclosed in this pre-commencement filing
offer_terms.offer_type: Unable to determine — tender offer not yet commenced
offer_terms.shares_sought: All issued and outstanding shares of common stock, par value $0.001 per share
offer_terms.minimum_condition: Not disclosed in this filing; referenced as a risk factor ('whether sufficient shareholders of the Company tender their shares')

timing.offer_commenced: Not yet commenced as of filing date (03/06/26)
timing.expiration_date: Not yet set — tender offer not commenced

L3_detailed.board_recommendation: UNABLE TO DETERMINE — this is a pre-commencement SC TO-C; the Company's Schedule 14D-9 has not yet been filed
L3_detailed.background_of_transaction: Servier S.A.S, Servier Pharmaceuticals LLC (Parent), and Servier Detroit Inc. (Merger Sub) entered into an Agreement and Plan of Merger with Day One Biopharmaceuticals on March 6, 2026. No further background on negotiations, competing bidders, or prior approaches is provided in this pre-commencement filing.
conditions_to_offer: Sufficient shareholders tendering their shares (minimum tender condition referenced but threshold not specified)
No injunctions or legal proceedings preventing the transaction (implied by risk factors)
Other tender offer conditions to be detailed in the forthcoming Schedule TO

financing.financing_condition: Unable to determine from this filing

required: Referenced generically — 'required regulatory approvals relating to the transaction'; specific agencies not identified in this filing

deal_protections.matching_rights: Risk factors reference 'the possibility that competing offers will be made' but no matching rights detail provided

L3_detailed.competing_offers: None disclosed; risk factors note 'the possibility that competing offers will be made'
L3_detailed.litigation: Risk factors reference 'the outcome of legal proceedings that may be instituted against the Company and/or others relating to the transaction' but no actual litigation disclosed
L3_detailed.amendment_changes: N/A — this is the initial pre-commencement SC TO-C filing
